overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a foggy abandoned industrial area with chain-link fences, concrete highway overpasses, and muddy terrain, transitioning through a dark tunnel to a curved road.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced industrial yard with red metal structures

events.description: passing through chain-link gate into open muddy yard
opening and walking through rusted metal door in red wall

agents.ego_description: walking through fenced industrial yard and opening a rusted red metal door

entered.detail: tall chain-link fence with metal posts enclosing the industrial yard
large red corrugated metal shipping container or building
weathered metal door set into the red wall with faded signage
stack of wooden pallets and debris near the fence
wooden utility poles with overhead wires

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a fenced industrial yard, passing through a chain-link gate and crossing a muddy area toward a large red metal structure. The atmosphere is thick with fog as the character opens a rusted door to proceed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy wasteland approaching highway overpass

events.description: large concrete highway overpass emerges from the dense fog ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across muddy terrain toward a massive concrete overpass structure

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with multiple arches spanning the area
tall evergreen trees visible through the fog in the distance
weathered advertising billboard with faded imagery

segments.scene_description: Exiting the red structure, the character traverses a wide muddy wasteland with sparse vegetation. A massive concrete highway overpass gradually materializes from the fog ahead, while power lines stretch across the gray sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between concrete overpass and chain fence

events.description: discovering weathered 'SILENT AV' sign leaning against chain-link fence

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the concrete overpass wall toward a tunnel entrance

entered.detail: massive weathered concrete wall of the highway overpass with graffiti
weathered wooden sign with 'SILENT AV' painted in white letters leaning against fence
green industrial dumpster with open lid

segments.scene_description: The path narrows into a corridor between the concrete overpass wall and a chain-link fence. The character passes a green dumpster and discovers a weathered 'SILENT AV' sign before approaching a dark tunnel entrance under the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark concrete tunnel under highway overpass

events.description: entering dark concrete tunnel, visibility drops significantly
passing through interior chain-link gate with restricted area sign
exiting tunnel back into foggy daylight

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark tunnel passage and emerging on the other side

entered.detail: dark arched tunnel entrance with icicles hanging from concrete overhang
graffiti-covered concrete walls with wire mesh windows
chain-link fence gate inside tunnel with restricted area warning sign

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark concrete tunnel beneath the overpass, passing through an interior chain-link gate marked with restricted area warnings. The lighting shifts dramatically to low artificial light before emerging back into the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved road with stone walls and guardrail in heavy fog

events.description: emerging from tunnel onto curved road with abandoned green vehicle

agents.ego_description: walking up the inclined curved road past an abandoned green car

entered.detail: vintage green sedan parked on the roadside covered in dust
tall stone wall covered in ivy and vegetation
rusted metal guardrail along the right side of the road
yellow diamond-shaped warning sign visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the character ascends a curved asphalt road bordered by a stone retaining wall and metal guardrail. An abandoned green car sits on the left shoulder as the road winds upward into the dense fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial wasteland that transitions from an open muddy yard into a claustrophobic tunnel and finally up a winding road. It begins as the character passes through a chain-link gate and a rusted door of a red metal structure, moving into a wide, fog-shrouded expanse where a massive concrete highway overpass gradually materializes. The path then narrows into a corridor between the overpass wall and a fence, passing a green dumpster and a weathered sign before the camera follows the character into the oppressive darkness of a concrete tunnel. After passing through a restricted area gate under dim artificial light, the scene shifts as the character emerges from the tunnel back into the gray mist. The movement finally ascends a curved asphalt road bordered by a stone wall and a metal guardrail, passing an abandoned green car as the path winds upward into the dense fog.
